name: Cabbage W/Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and drain the egg noodles according to package instructions.
2. Wash and chop the cabbage into small pieces.
3. Dice the onion.
4. In a large frying pan, sauté the onion over medium heat until soft.
5. Add the caraway seeds and continue cooking for a few more minutes.
6. Add the chopped cabbage and cook, stirring occasionally, until it wilts.
7. Stir in the cooked noodles and heat through until evenly warm.
8. Just before serving, stir in the sour cream.
